title: Conversational AI Engineer (Chatbots · Voicebots · GenAI Agents · RAG)

summary.lv: Sarunvalodas AI inženieris Accenture komandā — projektēt un veidot uzņēmumu līmeņa chatbotus, voicebotus, GenAI aģentus un RAG sistēmas, izmantojot platformas Cognigy.AI, Dialogflow CX, Teneo vai Watson. Obligāta pieredze Azure mākoņpakalpojumos un sarunvalodas plūsmu projektēšanā.
summary.en: Conversational AI engineer at Accenture designing and building enterprise-grade chatbots, voicebots, GenAI agents and RAG systems on platforms like Cognigy.AI, Dialogflow CX, Teneo or Watson. Requires hands-on Azure experience and 2+ years of conversation flow design.
